summary: DEEP FUNCTIONAL TESTING - ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE. Tested actual button clicks, form submissions, and data flows across 18+ features. Backend APIs: 11/11 passed. Frontend flows: Most working, 2 critical issues found.

minor.issue: Console shows 'Failed to fetch quests: AxiosError' on multiple pages - non-blocking but indicates background fetch failures

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map') when clicking game card. Error boundary catches it showing 'A dimensional rift appeared'
Market cards not rendering visually despite data being present in page content. Page appears empty.

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Games/CharacterSelect component - undefined.map error when loading game. Check if character data is being fetched/initialized properly before render.
FIX MEDIUM: GravityWellExchange - market cards not rendering. Check if market data state is being set correctly and if conditional rendering is blocking display.
critical_code_review_comments: CharacterSelect component at starseed/index.js:6418 tries to .map() on undefined - needs null check or default empty array
GravityWellExchange market state may not be updating correctly - market cards have 0 count despite API returning 7 elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deep functional testing completed. Backend APIs all working. Two frontend issues: 1) Games page crashes on CharacterSelect component (undefined.map), 2) Gravity Well market cards not rendering. All other flows (Journal, Meditation, Oracle, Breathing, Mood, Trade Circle, Liquidity Trader, Resource Alchemy, Cryptic Quest, Cosmic Mixer, Star Chart, Cosmic Ledger, Landing, Bottom Nav) working correctly.

functional_test_results.login: PASS - Redirects to /hub after successful login
functional_test_results.journal_save: PASS - Form fills, Save button clicks, entry created via API
functional_test_results.meditation_start: PASS - Timer mode works, Begin Session starts timer, Pause button appears
functional_test_results.oracle_reading: PASS - Tarot tab selects, Get Reading button clicks, 'Consulting the Oracle...' loading state appears
functional_test_results.breathing_start: PASS - Pattern selects, Begin Breathwork starts, Stop button appears
functional_test_results.mood_log: PASS - Mood selects (Peaceful), Capture Mood button clicks, mood logged
functional_test_results.trade_circle_trader: PASS - Trader tab clicks, Open Liquidity Trader button found and navigates
functional_test_results.liquidity_trader_alchemy: PASS - Alchemy tab shows 23.6% Accrual Rate, 15.0% Tax, 1.618 Phi Cap. Input 100 shows Net Result: 105 Dust
functional_test_results.resource_alchemy_mine: PASS - Mine Resources button clicks, inventory updates
functional_test_results.gravity_well_market: FAIL - Page loads but market cards not rendering (0 cards found despite API returning 7 elements)
functional_test_results.cryptic_quest: PASS - Page loads, nodes visible (some already solved)
functional_test_results.games: FAIL - Game cards found (5), but clicking causes CharacterSelect crash
functional_test_results.star_chart: PASS - Content loads with constellation/star data
functional_test_results.cosmic_ledger: PASS - Shows achievements, XP, stats, origins
functional_test_results.landing_quick_reset: PASS - Quick Reset modal appears with feeling selection

backend_api_test_results.GET /api/gaming/quest/nodes: PASS - nodes array with id, name, hint

games_character_select_crash.error: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')
games_character_select_crash.root_cause: The 'origins' prop is undefined when the component renders. The API call to /api/starseed/origins may fail silently or the component renders before data is fetched.
games_character_select_crash.fix: Add null check: {(origins || []).map(...)} at line 146 and line 176 (origin.traits.map)

gravity_well_empty.error: Market cards not rendering despite API returning 7 elements
gravity_well_empty.root_cause: The fetchMarket function returns early if !token (line 21). If the component renders before the auth token is available, the market data is never fetched.
gravity_well_empty.fix: Either wait for token before rendering, or add a retry mechanism when token becomes available
